final_prompt.prompt:
Create a panoramic gongbi-style scroll painting of the Tang Dynasty Chang'an Lantern Festival.

Style/medium: must be gongbi-style painting with heavy color application (工笔重彩)
Composition: must be panoramic long scroll format capturing the full breadth of Chang'an city
Subject: must include thousands of lanterns (万盏花灯) illuminating the scene
Scene/backdrop: must include Tang Dynasty Chang'an cityscape during Lantern Festival night
Lighting/mood: needs a festive night atmosphere with lantern glow — exact light distribution is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, saturated direction fitting gongbi heavy-color tradition — exact pigment choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a traditional scroll painting surface treatment — exact paper texture and brushwork detail is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the Tang Dynasty historical setting and Lantern Festival context
Avoid:
